_comment: Official Semrush MCP server (streamable HTTP). Claude Code authenticates each user via OAuth on first use — they log into their own Semrush account; nothing is stored in this file. For headless/CI use without OAuth, add an API-key header instead: "headers": { "Authorization": "Apikey YOUR_API_KEY" } (key from https://www.semrush.com/accounts/profile/api). See README.md > 'Connect Semrush'.
